entries.claim_text: Perplexity-Based Data Pruning With Small Reference Models
entries.quoted_snippet: Perplexity-Based Data Pruning With Small Reference Models
neurips_2024

entries.claim_text: Zachary Ankner, Cody Blakeney, Kartik Sreenivasan, Max Marion, Matthew L. Leavitt, Mansheej Paul
entries.quoted_snippet: Zachary Ankner

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: preprint

entries.claim_text: 各設定在預訓練過程中的中途下游表現，剪枝在所有評估步數都勝過基線
entries.quoted_snippet: Perplexity-based data pruning leads to an improvement in performance for all intermediate training steps evaluated

entries.claim_text: 參考模型評估出的樣本 perplexity 分布，Pile 多峰、Dolma 單峰
entries.quoted_snippet: Distribution of sample perplexities as evaluated by the reference model for the Pile and Dolma

entries.claim_text: 各領域在剪枝前後佔資料集的比例
entries.quoted_snippet: Proportion of the total dataset each domain makes up before and after pruning

entries.claim_text: 把 3 billion 參數模型的平均表現提升最多 2.04
entries.quoted_snippet: improves the average performance on downstream tasks of a 3 billion parameter model by up to 2.04

entries.claim_text: 用來訓練參考模型
entries.quoted_snippet: we partition the original dataset into two splits: one for training the reference model and one for training the final model

entries.claim_text: D_ref, D_train ← random_split(D, R)
entries.quoted_snippet: we compute the reference model's perplexity on each of the samples in the final model's training split

entries.claim_text: \text{PPLX}(x)=2^{\text{NLL}(x)}
entries.quoted_snippet: the perplexity of a sample under a reference language model is the best pruning metric

entries.claim_text: medium 則選 perplexity 落在中位數附近的樣本
entries.quoted_snippet: In medium selection, we select samples whose perplexity is close to the median perplexity

entries.claim_text: 參考模型固定 125 million 參數
entries.quoted_snippet: All reference models have 125 million parameters, and we consider final models with 1 billion and 3 billion parameters

entries.claim_text: a_n=\frac{a_m-a_r}{1-a_r}
entries.quoted_snippet: we normalize the accuracy of each individual task

entries.claim_text: 每個任務的分數會先用隨機猜測基線做歸一化
entries.quoted_snippet: normalize each task by the baseline of random guessing

entries.claim_text: 論文把 33 個任務分成
entries.quoted_snippet: We evaluate models on 33 different downstream question-answering tasks using the MosaicML evaluation gauntlet

entries.claim_text: 最佳剪枝設定對比無剪枝基線的平均歸一化準確率
entries.quoted_snippet: Average normalized accuracy grouped by task category for both datasets and both final model sizes
outperforms the average downstream performance of no pruning for 1B models by 1.89 and 1.51 for the Pile and Dolma respectively

entries.claim_text: 平均反而比不剪枝掉了 0.23
entries.quoted_snippet: selecting medium-perplexity samples on the Pile leads to a decrease in the average downstream performance of 0.23

entries.claim_text: 只保留 perplexity 最高的那 50% 樣本
entries.quoted_snippet: the best settings are to select high-perplexity samples at a 50\% rate for the Pile

entries.claim_text: 1.31 倍與 1.45 倍更少的步數
entries.quoted_snippet: reach the same average normalized accuracy as the baseline models
we see a gain of 1.51 when training for a compute optimal duration but this decreases to a gain of 0.84 when over-training
training on perplexity pruned data significantly worsens perplexity on a test split of the pretraining data, while the average downstream performance is significantly improved

entries.claim_text: Pubmed Central、ArXiv、Github 等領域的比例至少被砍到原本的三分之一以下
entries.quoted_snippet: pruning increases the proportion of data coming from web-scraped domains while decreasing the proportion of data coming from highly specific technical domains

entries.claim_text: 上游與下游可以
entries.quoted_snippet: we find that some techniques that significantly improve downstream performance have no, or even adverse, effects on upstream performance

entries.claim_text: 完全沒有掃描參考模型大小
entries.quoted_snippet: All reference models have 125 million parameters, and we consider final models with 1 billion and 3 billion parameters

entries.claim_text: 沒有一套能事先預測參數的理論
entries.quoted_snippet: we do not present a predictive theory for how pruning parameters should be selected for different datasets

entries.claim_text: 砍掉 code 與科學論文
entries.quoted_snippet: Future work should investigate how perplexity-based pruning affects a model's performance on downstream tasks that are in the same category as the highly pruned domains
